faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Rutherford, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rutherford residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and acrobat ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in Rutherford's many historic homes. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly.
